nasb.text: They shall leave none of it until morning, nor break a bone of it; according to all the statute of the Passover they shall observe it.

esv.text: They shall leave none of it until the morning, nor break any of its bones; according to all the statute for the Passover they shall keep it.

cnv.text: 一點也不留到早晨，羊羔的骨頭，一根也不可折斷；他們要照著逾越節的一切律例守節。

ccb.text: 食物不可留到天明，也不可折断羊羔的一根骨头。要遵守逾越节的一切律例。
